title: Hide Players (1.21.10+)
description: Allows you to hide all the players on the server
body:
This is the first version of the HidePlayers mod.

Features:
- In the game settings, you can change the button to hide the player MISC -> Hide Players
- The player's hitbox is hidden (players cannot be hit)
- The player's model is hidden

In future versions, the following changes are planned:
- Add the ability to add a list of players that will not be hidden
- Add complete customization options
